title: Sink Your Friends' Boats!
description: A simple server-side mod that allows you to troll your friends by making their boats sink in water. (Also works on single-player and LAN, but only requires the owner/host to have the mod installed)
body:
# Sink your friends' boats! Sink your friends' boats is a primarily _server-side_ mod that allows for exactly one function: sink your friends' boats. This mod also works on singleplayer and LAN worlds - only the host/server has to have the mod installed. It works the same as on the server. To troll your friends, you HAVE to be a server operator (_/op_) DISCLAIMER: You will need fabric loader 0.18.5. On modrinth, you can change that under Settings -> Installation ## How do I sink them BOATS? If you are a server operator (permission level 2) you gain access to the command ``` /sinkingboats ``` This command gives you **5** options: ### Add ``` /sinkingboats add ``` This command allows you to add a Player to the list of players whose boats will sink on water. It lets you autofill with Players that are online ### Remove ``` /sinkingboats remove ``` This command allows you to remove a Player from the list of players whose boats will sink on water. It lets you autofill with Players that are online ### clear ``` /sinkingboats clear ``` This command clears the list. All players are free to endugle in travel by boat. ### refresh ``` /sinkingboats refresh ``` This is a "just-in-case" command which allows you to refresh the loaded list of players whose boats are to sink. This may be useful if you change the config file manually ### list ``` /sinkingboats list ``` This command allows operators to list all players whose boats will sink. ## Manual manipulation If you want to add players wihtout commands, you will find the config file under ``` /saves/[your_world]/boatsinking/boat-sinking-players.json ``` for singleplayer and ``` /world/boatsinking/boat-sinking-players.json ``` on servers.
To add your own players, add their UUIDs to the json list.
